headline: Bio-Techne Is a Top S&P 500 Stock. Germany’s Merck Is Paying a 24% Premium for the Company.
summary: Shares of  Bio-Techne  surged Thursday after Germany’s  Merck KGaA  announced it agreed to purchase the company for $11.3 billion.  Bio-Techne stock jumped 20% to $70.55 on Thursday, placing it near the top of the  for the trading session and set to log its best daily percentage gain since May 1, 2003, according to Dow Jones Market Data.  Merck KGaA plans to acquire Bio-Techne for $73 a share, according to the media release, representing a 24% premium based on the stock’s closing price from Wednesday.

headline: Germany’s Merck Is Buying Bio-Techne for $11.3 Billion
summary: Shares of  Bio-Techne  surged before the opening bell on Thursday after Germany’s  Merck KGaA  announced it has agreed to purchase the company for $11.3 billion.  Bio-Techne stock jumped 21% to $70.95 in premarket trading on Thursday.  Merck KGaA plans to acquire Bio-Techne for $73 a share, according to the media release, representing a 24% premium based on the stock’s closing price from Wednesday.

headline: Merck KGaA, Darmstadt, Germany, Agrees to Acquire Bio-Techne, Strengthening Leadership Position in Fast-Growing Life Sciences Markets
